title: ExtractionResult
description: Structured entities/relationships extracted from a local document (PDF, HTML, or text/Markdown) via the Claude API. Successful files in output/ follow this shape.

document.description: Deterministic metadata filled in by the pipeline, not by the LLM.

source.description: Local file path or URL the content was read from.

format.description: How the source was classified: 'pdf' (native document block), 'html' (local .html/.htm file, e.g. a saved web page), or 'text' (local .txt/.md/other text file).

extracted_at.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp when extraction was run.

summary.description: Optional 1-2 sentence summary of the document, supplied by the LLM.

entities.description: Named entities found in the document.

type.description: Unrecognized values reported by the LLM are coerced to OTHER by the validation layer (with a warning), not rejected.

mentions.description: Optional list of alternate surface forms/mentions of this entity in the text.

relationships.description: Subject-relation-object triples found in the document.

context.description: Optional supporting quote or paraphrase from the source.

warnings.description: Non-fatal issues recorded by the pipeline itself (truncation, coerced entity types, dropped malformed items, retry occurred, etc). Never written by the LLM directly.
